issue_key.description: The key of the issue to update (e.g. WEBAPP-123).

summary.description: The new summary for the issue.

description.description: The new description for the issue.

status.description: Transition the issue to this status name (e.g. In Progress, Done, Closed).

priority.description: The new priority for the issue.

assignee.description: The account ID of the user to assign the issue to. Pass null to unassign.

labels.description: Replace the issue's labels with this list.

fix_versions.description: Replace the issue's fix versions with this list.
